title: IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES - 211info
text: CATHOLIC CHARITIES IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides professional legal representation, advice, and advocacy to low-income immigrants to protect and advance their rights. Focuses on family reunification and assistance to the most vulnerable immigrants, including victims of crimes such as domestic violence and human trafficking. Engages in public education, training, and community outreach to inform immigrants about their rights and options for immigration relief. 2740 SE Powell Boulevard #5 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Low-income immigrants Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm by appointment only Email (503) 231-4866 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 231-4866 Clark Family Center Immigration Services (503) 542-2855 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule a consultation appointment. Existing clients should contact their representatives directly. FEES: $60 consultation fee. Fees for handling immigration matters vary by service needed. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on TriMet bus line 9 Powell Boulevard Services: Immigrant Rights Groups Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING TRANSITIONS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REFUGEE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CATHOLIC CHARITIES
